'''House Carbinol''' was an aristocratic [[Ancient Houses|Ancient House]] in the [[Senex sector/Legends|Senex]] or [[Juvex sector/Legends|Juvex sector]]. In [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]], under [[Lady/Legends|Lady]] [[Carbinol]], it allied with [[Roganda Ismaren/Legends|Roganda Ismaren]].
